name: Qwen Image Edit 2511 API

automatic_detection.RTX_4060_8GB: GGUF Q2_K, low-VRAM mode, CPU VAE, 1 candidate
automatic_detection.H100_or_A100_80GB: BF16, high-VRAM mode, default 2 and max 4 candidates
automatic_detection.H200_NVL_141GB: BF16, GPU-only mode, default 4 and max 8 candidates

notes: GPU name and VRAM are detected at container startup.
The startup script downloads only the model required for the detected profile.
Omit candidates in API requests to use the detected automatic default.
Reuse the same /workspace persistent volume to avoid downloading models again.
Expose port 8000 only; raw ComfyUI remains internal.
Manual environment overrides remain available for benchmarking.
